description: 魔法炮充能/释放逻辑，通过行为树实现。
buffs: {"{\"name\": \"魔法炮充能buff\", \"agent\": \"class Agent {\\n  constructor() {\\n    this._charge = 0; // 真正存值的地方\\n  }\\n\\n  get charge() {\\n    return this._charge;\\n  }\\n\\n  set charge(i) {\\n    this._charge = Number(i) || 0;\\n  }\\n\\n  addCharge(i) {\\n    this.charge = this.charge + (Number(i) || 0);\\n    console.log('魔法炮充能：',this._charge)\\n    return State.SUCCEEDED\\n  }\\n}\", \"definition\": \"root {\\n  repeat {\\n    sequence {\\n      wait [1000]\\n      action [addCharge, 1]\\n    }\\n  }\\n}\", \"memberType\": \"Player\"}"}
